name: Goblin Biker Dugg Charger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>百鬼羅刹</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゴブリンライダー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>特</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>攻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ダグ
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon this card. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Goblin Biker" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Goblin Biker Dugg Charger" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon this card. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Goblin Biker" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Goblin Biker Dugg Charger" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon this card. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Goblin Biker" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Goblin Biker Dugg Charger" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
